## âœ¦ Memory Sentence
> *"**LIGHT** fills the **GARDEN**, the 
**SERPENT** draws **BLOOD**, **GENEALOGY** flows to the **ARK** through **RAIN** and a **DOVE** and a **RAINBOW** 
scattering the **NATIONS** from a **TOWER** â€” God calls Abram to an **ALTAR**, **LOT** departs, a **KING** blesses 
over wine, the **STARS** are counted, **HAGAR** weeps, **CIRCUMCISION** seals the promise, three visitors reach the 
**TENT**, **SMOKE** rises over Sodom, a **SISTER** lie recurs, a **WELL** gives Ishmael life, a **MOUNTAIN** tests a 
father's love, a **CAVE** holds Sarah, **CAMELS** find a bride, **STEW** buys a birthright, **WELLS** are quarreled 
over, **HANDS** in goatskin steal a blessing, a **LADDER** reaches heaven, a **STONE** is rolled from the well of 
Rachel, **STICKS** multiply the flock, a **PILLAR** marks farewell, **WRESTLING** makes a new name, **EMBRACE** heals 
old wounds, **SHECHEM** breaks the peace, **BETHEL** renews the call, **EDOM** lists its kings, a **COAT** falls into 
a pit, a **STAFF** is pledged to Tamar, **PRISON** holds the dreamer, **DREAMS** open a door, **PHARAOH** bows to 
God's man, **GRAIN** brings the brothers south, **BENJAMIN** must come, a **CUP** sets the trap, **WEEPING** breaks 
the wall, **WAGONS** roll north for Jacob, **LAND** is purchased with bread, **CROSSED** hands bless the younger, a 
**LION** roars over Judah's tribe, and **BONES** wait for resurrection."*

```

1â€“12   =  DELIVERANCE   (Slavery, plagues, Passover)
```

*The book moves from slavery to

# ðŸ“– BOOK 3: LEVITICUS (27 Chapters)

## 
âœ¦ Image Word: ALTAR | Key Word: HOLY | Subtitle: *Come Near â€” But Only Through Blood and Fire*

## âœ¦ Big 
Structure
```
Chapters  1â€“7    =  OFFERINGS     (Five types of sacrifice)
Chapters  8â€“10   =  PRIESTHOOD  
  (Aaron consecrated â€” Nadab and Abihu)
Chapters  11â€“16  =  PURITY        (Clean and unclean â€” Day of 
Atonement)
Chapters  17â€“27  =  HOLINESS CODE ("Be holy for I am holy")
```
Think: **7 â†’ 3 â†’ 6 â†’ 
11**
*Leviticus answers one question: How does a sinful people
approach a holy God? The entire book is God's 
answer â€”
through sacrifice, through priesthood, through atonement,
through holiness. Every chapter points to 
Christ.*

## âœ¦ One-Word Anchors

| Ch | One Word | Scene |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | **BURNT** | Burnt 
offering â€” total surrender, completely consumed |
| 2 | **GRAIN** | Grain offering â€” devotion and gratitude 
|
| 3 | **PEACE** | Fellowship/peace offering â€” communion with God |
| 4 | **SIN** | Sin offering â€” covering 
for unintentional sin |
| 5 | **GUILT** | Guilt offering â€” restitution required |
| 6 | **FIRE** | The fire on 
the altar must never go out |
| 7 | **FAT** | Fat and blood belong exclusively to God |
| 8 | **OIL** | Aaron 
anointed with oil â€” the priesthood consecrated |
| 9 | **GLORY** | God's glory appears â€” fire consumes the 
offering |
| 10 | **STRANGE** | Nadab and Abihu offer unauthorized fire â€” they die instantly |
| 11 | 
**CLEAN** | Clean and unclean animals â€” what may be eaten |
| 12 | **BLOOD** | Purification after childbirth â€” 
the mother's blood |
| 13 | **SKIN** | Diagnosis of leprosy â€” the priest examines the skin |
| 14 | **BIRD** | 
Two birds ritual â€” one killed, one set free |
| 15 | **DISCHARGE** | Bodily discharges and their purification 
|
| 16 | **GOAT** | Day of Atonement â€” two goats, one slain, one sent away |
| 17 | **BLOOD** | "The life of 
the flesh is in the blood" |
| 18 | **NAKED** | Laws against sexual immorality |
| 19 | **LOVE** | "Love your 
neighbor as yourself" â€” holiness in daily life |
| 20 | **STONES** | Capital punishments â€” stoning for serious 
violations |
| 21 | **BLEMISH** | Priests must be without physical defect |
| 22 | **ACCEPTABLE** | Offerings 
must be without blemish to be acceptable |
| 23 | **FEASTS** | Seven appointed feasts of Israel â€” the sacred 
calendar |
| 24 | **LAMPSTAND** | Oil for the lamps â€” blasphemer stoned |
| 25 | **JUBILEE** | The fiftieth 
year â€” liberty proclaimed throughout the land |
| 26 | **WALK** | Blessings for obedience â€” curses for 
persistent rebellion |
| 27 | **VOWS** | Consecration and redemption of vows |

## âœ¦ Memory Sentence
> 
*"The **BURNT** offering, **GRAIN** offering, **PEACE** offering, **SIN** offering, **GUILT** offering rise from the 
**FIRE** â€” God claims the **FAT**, **OIL** anoints Aaron, **GLORY** appears, **STRANGE** fire kills, **CLEAN** and 
unclean animals are listed, a mother's **BLOOD** requires purification, the priest examines the **SKIN**, a **BIRD** 
is released, **DISCHARGE** defiles, the **GOAT** carries the sins away â€” for the **BLOOD** is the life, so avoid the 
**NAKED** violations, **LOVE** your neighbor, **STONES** judge the guilty, no **BLEMISH** in the priest or offering, 
all seven **FEASTS** are kept, the **LAMPSTAND** burns, the **JUBILEE** trumpet sounds, **WALK** in obedience or face 
the curse, and honor every **VOW**."*

## âœ¦ Key Verses
| Verse | Theme |
|---|---|
| **17:11** | 
*"The life of the flesh is in the blood â€” it is the blood that makes atonement"* â†’ The theology of all sacrifice 
|
| **19:2** | *"Be holy because I, the LORD your God, am holy"* â†’ The heartbeat of Leviticus |
| **19:18** 
| *"Love your neighbor as yourself"* â†’ The social commandment Jesus called the second greatest |
| **16:30** | 
*"On this day atonement will be made for you â€” before the LORD you will be clean"* â†’ The Day of Atonement 
|

*Numbers is the record of an eleven-day journey

## âœ¦ Memory Sentence
> *"The **CENSUS** arranges the **CAMP**, **LEVITES** serve, **KOHATH** carries,
